message:
fix(abi): fix underflow, bounds, and host delegation across 8 ABI modules

Fixes: iconv saturating_sub, inet offset_of!, stdlib ndigit bounds,
termios null checks. Host delegation: IO exports fallback, stdio
registry fallthrough, process PATH lookup from envp. Add test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
